reference: I have tingling in my lips and tongue one or two days after I eat mutton, chicken, and fish. One or two mouth ulcers also occur. I have been having this problem for three years. If I do not eat the aforementioned foods, I do not experience any of the symptoms. Could you help me determine what could be the cause?
text: I have tingling in my lips and tongue one or two days after I eat mutton, chicken, and fish. One or two mouth ulcers also occur. I have been having this problem for three years. If I do not eat the aforementioned foods, I do not experience any of the symptoms. Could you help me determine what could be the cause?
